steps.description: Click on the "Custom Engine Agent" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the "Weather Agent" option from the dropdown menu in the "App Features Using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK" interface.
Click the "JavaScript" option from the dropdown menu in the "Programming Language" selector in the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click on the "Default folder" input field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select or modify the folder path.
